name: clankers-wordcount
description: Word count and text statistics plugin

tool_definitions.name: wordcount
tool_definitions.description: Count words, lines, and characters in the given text. Returns a JSON object with word_count, line_count, char_count, and byte_count.

tool_definitions.name: textstats
tool_definitions.description: Compute detailed text statistics: average word length, longest word, most frequent words, sentence count, and reading time estimate.

top_n.description: Number of top frequent words to return (default: 5)
